inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The supplied role mix is 4-digit 5412 and misstates the bookkeeper/biller concentration of the selected subsegment.
inputs.pi_dist: QuickBooks Live is a national platform benchmark, not an independent 541219 price census.
inputs.pi_moat: Some non-CPA accounting and medical-billing subsegments have different moats.
inputs.t50_years: No 541219 census measures effective AI replacement.
inputs.t50_years: This is intentionally positive because current effective adoption is below 50%.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: S3 covers accounting professionals, not code-matched non-CPA bookkeeping firms.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: S4 covers SMB clients across sectors, not providers.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: Not evidence of an owner-age census.
inputs.active_consolidators: Does not assert that no acquisitions occurred; it records no qualifying documented evidence in this packet.
inputs.buy_mult: Not an observed transaction multiple.
inputs.buy_mult: Small practice listings often quote revenue or SDE with owner compensation inside.
inputs.exit_mult: No reopened exit comp matches the rubric's $10M-plus EBITDA and selected-service scope.
inputs.pricing_structure: Observed pricing is a platform benchmark, not a census of independent firms.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $116,910 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541219); class <5: 35,754 firms, avg revenue/firm $191,355 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $29,947 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 5,777 firms, avg revenue/firm $656,548 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $102,750 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 2,081 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,497,395 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $234,342 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 1,247 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,177,727 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $653,814 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 282 firms, avg revenue/firm $13,787,344 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,157,719 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 249 firms, avg revenue/firm $24,583,161 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,847,265 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 531

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Bookkeeping/write-up and billing workflows are task-automatable, while review, cleanup, exception handling, and relationship work remain. The frozen 5412 role mix is a CPA-heavy proxy, so the residual judgment reflects the prompt's bookkeeping/billing-dominant hypothesis rather than a claimed measured wage mix.

l.detail: BLS Industry Productivity (IPS) direct: labor compensation (L02) $29,298.0M / sectoral output (T30) $36,927.9M, year 2022

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Mechanics, exact identity, frozen digests, deterministic dataset injection, fresh finalization, memo rendering, and arithmetic all pass. The corrected 541219 scope and the direction of the pressured, low-capture thesis are supported, with no reversed factor semantics or material capture/terminal double count. The conclusion remains useful but low confidence: code-specific occupational mix, effective adoption timing, ownership, consolidator activity, and transaction multiples are unavailable or estimated, and the adoption evidence is broader than 541219.

sources.title: U.S. Census Bureau NAICS 541219 definition
sources.what_it_supports: 541219 excludes tax-preparation-only and payroll-only services and includes non-CPA accountant, bookkeeper, and billing offices.

sources.title: QuickBooks Live Bookkeeping monthly pricing and service description
sources.what_it_supports: Current $500 first-month cleanup/onboarding price; $200/$400/$600 ongoing monthly tiers; and managed categorization, reconciliation, reporting, and bookkeeping assistance.

sources.title: 2025 Intuit QuickBooks Accountant Technology Survey
sources.what_it_supports: Survey of 700 accounting professionals reporting 46% daily AI use, 95% process automation, AI use in data entry/processing, and workflow use in invoicing/payments.

sources.title: 2026 Intuit QuickBooks AI Impact Report
sources.what_it_supports: Broad SMB context: 34,000-plus owner responses and anonymized data from 5.3 million QuickBooks businesses; regular AI use is broad but paid commitment is narrower, and bookkeeping is among top AI task areas.

title: Other Accounting Services
